name: afrohit-studio
description: AfroHit Studio — AI production house for African and diaspora artists

scripts.ci: pnpm run lint && pnpm run verify && pnpm run build && pnpm run security:audit
scripts.verify: pnpm --filter @afrohit/shared build && pnpm --filter @afrohit/db build && pnpm --filter @afrohit/ai build && pnpm --filter @afrohit/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @afrohit/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @afrohit/worker typecheck && pnpm --filter @afrohit/api test:source-mix-lineage && pnpm --filter @afrohit/api test:direct-upload-release && pnpm --filter @afrohit/api test:release-artifact-integrity && pnpm --filter @afrohit/api test:drop-terminal-integrity && pnpm --filter @afrohit/api test:tenant-surface-isolation && pnpm --filter @afrohit/web test:nav-manifest && pnpm --filter @afrohit/worker test && node scripts/test-benchmark-corpus.mjs && node scripts/test-video-treatment.mjs
